entities.description: The district where the Parasai-Sindh watershed is located

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient water resources in the study region

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of land resources in the watershed

entities.description: Factors contributing to the vulnerability of the Bundelkhand region

entities.name: POOR INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: Lack of development contributing to low agricultural production

entities.description: Reduced crop yields resulting from vulnerability and poor infrastructure

entities.name: PRECARIOUS LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: Unstable economic conditions for the local population

entities.name: GROUNDWATER DYNAMICS
entities.description: The movement and availability of groundwater in the watershed

entities.description: The physical cover of the earth's surface and its utilization

entities.description: Monitoring tools used to investigate groundwater dynamics

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Technology used to prepare land use land cover maps

entities.description: System used for the analysis and mapping of land use land cover

entities.name: LANDSAT IMAGES
entities.description: Satellite imagery used as data for LULC mapping

entities.description: Land covered by buildings and infrastructure
